summary: Design an AI platform to evaluate tenders, understand bidders, assess eligibility, and produce explainable reports for government procurement.
tech_stack: LLMs like Gemini 1.5 Pro or GPT-4o
key_steps: Extracting, categorizing, and normalizing critical entities
optimization_claims: Trading raw processing speed for layered accuracy
constraints_addressed: Compliance with CVC, CAG, and RTI guidelines
No bidder is ever silently disqualified
